boundary_rows.reading: V1.12CU does not reopen packaging template learning. It only decides whether packaging admission deserves promotion from miss-diagnostic into a governed mainline extension candidate.
Packaging admission promotion remains separate from the deferred 300308/300502 joint residual stack.
Only the full 20-day packaging admission mode beats neutral on both return and drawdown. The clipped mode improves return but worsens drawdown and cannot serve as the default promotion path.

interpretation: V1.12CU turns packaging admission from a residual miss diagnostic into a governed promotion decision.

The review supports promoting full_20d packaging admission into a controlled mainline extension candidate because it improves both neutral return and neutral max drawdown without reopening packaging template learning.
